system.notes:
Heroic Bluecoat, City Law

There are actually songs about him. He is very popular. Veleris is a skilled orator (though he retreats into modesty) and a canny judge of character and situations. (He insists he just tries to do the right thing.) His opinion is influential in his district. He is trusted to guard valuables. His moustaches are his pride and joy.

He has no family, and he seems to be an idealist. Some try to persuade him, others try to threaten him. Threats don't seem to work. He has been known to quietly hire outsiders to get justice.
